# MPSGraphSingleGateRNNDescriptor

**Class**

The class that defines the parameters for a single gate RNN operation.

## Declaration

```swift
class MPSGraphSingleGateRNNDescriptor
```

## Overview

Use this descriptor with the following [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph] methods:

- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNN(_:recurrentWeight:initState:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNN(_:recurrentWeight:inputWeight:bias:initState:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNN(_:recurrentWeight:inputWeight:bias:initState:mask:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNNGradients(_:recurrentWeight:sourceGradient:zState:initState:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNNGradients(_:recurrentWeight:sourceGradient:zState:inputWeight:bias:initState:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNNGradients(_:recurrentWeight:sourceGradient:zState:inputWeight:bias:initState:mask:descriptor:name:)]
- [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraph/singleGateRNNGradients(_:recurrentWeight:sourceGradient:zState:stateGradient:inputWeight:bias:initState:mask:descriptor:name:)]

## Instance Properties

- **activation**: A parameter that defines the activation function to use with the RNN operation.
- **bidirectional**: A parameter that defines a bidirectional RNN layer.
- **reverse**: A parameter that defines time direction of the input sequence.
- **training**: A parameter that makes the RNN layer support training.

## Classes

- **MPSGraph**: The optimized representation of a compute graph of operations and tensors.
- **MPSGraphCompilationDescriptor**: A class that consists of all the levers for compiling graphs.
- **MPSGraphConvolution2DOpDescriptor**: A class that describes the properties of a 2D-convolution operator.
- **MPSGraphConvolution3DOpDescriptor**: A class that describes the properties of a 3D-convolution operator.
- **MPSGraphCreateSparseOpDescriptor**: A class that describes the properties of a create sparse operation.
- **MPSGraphDepthwiseConvolution2DOpDescriptor**: A class that defines the parameters for  a 2D-depthwise convolution operation.
- **MPSGraphDepthwiseConvolution3DOpDescriptor**: The class that defines the parameters for a 3D-depthwise convolution operation.
- **MPSGraphDevice**: A class that describes the compute device.
- **MPSGraphExecutable**: The compiled representation of a compute graph executable.
- **MPSGraphExecutableExecutionDescriptor**: A class that consists of all the levers  to synchronize and schedule executable execution.
- **MPSGraphExecutableSerializationDescriptor**: A class that consists of all the levers  to serialize an executable.
- **MPSGraphExecutionDescriptor**: A class that consists of all the levers  to synchronize and schedule graph execution.
- **MPSGraphFFTDescriptor**: The class that defines the parameters for a fast Fourier transform (FFT) operation.
- **MPSGraphGRUDescriptor**: The class that defines the parameters for a gated recurrent unit (GRU) operation.
- **MPSGraphImToColOpDescriptor**: The class that defines the parameters for an image to column or column to image operation.

## Inherits From

- MPSGraphObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
